ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) tamarind pulps (see Note), seeds removed
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) tamarind pulps (see Note), seeds removed

ingredients.item: 5 ounces (142 g) plum tomatoes, cut into wedges
ingredients.original: 5 ounces (142 g) plum tomatoes, cut into wedges

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 4 or 5 makrut lime leaves, roughly torn into chunks, center stems removed
ingredients.original: 4 or 5 makrut lime leaves, roughly torn into chunks, center stems removed

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon (or to taste) vegan fish sauce (optional)
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon (or to taste) vegan fish sauce (optional)

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) straw or white button mushrooms, rinsed in salted water and halved
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) straw or white button mushrooms, rinsed in salted water and halved

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) enoki mushrooms, stems trimmed and rinsed in salted water
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) enoki mushrooms, stems trimmed and rinsed in salted water

ingredients.item: 1. Soak tamarind pulps in the hot water for about 15 minutes. Use a spoon to break up the pulps, press through a strainer to get a tamarind paste, and then discard the fibrous part. Set aside.
ingredients.original: 1. Soak tamarind pulps in the hot water for about 15 minutes. Use a spoon to break up the pulps, press through a strainer to get a tamarind paste, and then discard the fibrous part. Set aside.

ingredients.item: 2. Trim off the green upper parts and lowest, toughest portions at the bases of the lemongrass stalks. Place on a cutting board and bruise the bulbous end with a pestle or meat tenderizer to release fragrance and flavor.
ingredients.original: 2. Trim off the green upper parts and lowest, toughest portions at the bases of the lemongrass stalks. Place on a cutting board and bruise the bulbous end with a pestle or meat tenderizer to release fragrance and flavor.

ingredients.item: 3. Cut tofu into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes and set aside.
ingredients.original: 3. Cut tofu into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes and set aside.

ingredients.item: 4. Heat oil in a 2-quart (2 L) saucepan over medium-low heat. When hot, add the leeks and cook and stir until fragrant (about 30 seconds). Add lemongrass stalks, tomatoes, 4 cups (1 L) of water, salt, stock powder, sugar, and lime leaves to the pan and bring to a boil.
ingredients.original: 4. Heat oil in a 2-quart (2 L) saucepan over medium-low heat. When hot, add the leeks and cook and stir until fragrant (about 30 seconds). Add lemongrass stalks, tomatoes, 4 cups (1 L) of water, salt, stock powder, sugar, and lime leaves to the pan and bring to a boil.

ingredients.item: 5. Stir in tamarind paste and tofu, and season with vegan fish sauce (if using) or more salt. Continue to boil until the tomatoes are tender (3 to 5 minutes). During the last minute of cooking, separate the mushrooms into bite-size bunches and stir them in. When soup returns to a boil, remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 5. Stir in tamarind paste and tofu, and season with vegan fish sauce (if using) or more salt. Continue to boil until the tomatoes are tender (3 to 5 minutes). During the last minute of cooking, separate the mushrooms into bite-size bunches and stir them in. When soup returns to a boil, remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 6. Transfer soup to bowls and serve hot.
ingredients.original: 6. Transfer soup to bowls and serve hot.
